parts.text:
Great question! The 50/30/20 rule is a simple yet powerful budgeting guideline to manage your finances effectively.

*   **50%** of your after-tax income goes towards "needs" (housing, utilities, groceries, transportation).
*   **30%** is allocated to "wants" (dining out, entertainment, hobbies).
*   **20%** is dedicated to "savings & debt repayment" (emergency fund, retirement, credit card debt).

It's a fantastic framework to ensure you're prioritizing your financial future while still enjoying life. Start implementing it today!
